name: awln
description: An editorial Ghost theme built for A Whole Lotta Nothing — readable typography, large-format photography, and a featured-plus-trio post grid.

show_dropcap.description: Show a large drop capital on the first paragraph of every post.

header_tagline.default: Notes on woodworking, homelabs, EVs, and whatever else holds my attention this month.
header_tagline.description: Short italic tagline shown next to the title on the homepage.

header_title_word.description: The accent-colored italic word in the homepage header (e.g. 'Latest writing').
